content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "請問洗手間在哪裡？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問洗手間在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 xi3 shou3 jian1 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, where is the restroom?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 화장실이 어디에 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "洗手間在二樓，從這裡直走，然後右轉，上樓梯就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Xǐshǒujiān zài èr lóu, cóng zhèlǐ zhí zǒu, ránhòu yòu zhuǎn, shàng lóutī jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xi3 shou3 jian1 zai4 er4 lou2, cong2 zhe4 li3 zhi2 zou3, ran2 hou4 you4 zhuan3, shang4 lou2 ti1 jiu4 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "The restroom is on the second floor. Walk straight from here, then turn right, and go up the stairs.",
          "translation_ko": "화장실은 2층에 있습니다. 여기서 직진하신 후 오른쪽으로 돌아서 계단으로 올라가시면 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝。請問電梯在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxie. Qǐng wèn diàntī zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, xie4 xie5. qing3 wen4 dian4 ti1 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. Where is the elevator?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 엘리베이터는 어디에 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "電梯在左邊，靠近門口。",
          "pinyin": "Diàntī zài zuǒ biān, kàojìn ménkǒu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dian4 ti1 zai4 zuo3 bian1, kao4 jin4 men2 kou3.",
          "translation_en": "The elevator is on the left, near the entrance.",
          "translation_ko": "엘리베이터는 왼쪽, 출구 근처에 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝你，我現在去二樓。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ, wǒ xiànzài qù èr lóu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 xian4 zai4 qu4 er4 lou2.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll go to the second floor now.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 지금 2층으로 가겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the restroom?",
          "question_ko": "화장실은 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["First floor, turn left", "Second floor, go straight then turn right and go up stairs", "Third floor, near the elevator"],
          "options_ko": ["1층, 왼쪽으로 돌기", "2층, 직진 후 오른쪽으로 돌고 계단 올라가기", "3층, 엘리베이터 근처"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for directions to the restroom or elevator in a store."
    },
    {
      "title": "請問櫃台在哪裡？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問櫃台在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn guìtái zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 gui4 tai2 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, where is the counter?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 카운터가 어디에 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "櫃台在一樓，從入口進去，直走，然後左轉就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Guìtái zài yī lóu, cóng rùkǒu jìnqù, zhí zǒu, ránhòu zuǒ zhuǎn jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "gui4 tai2 zai4 yi1 lou2, cong2 ru4 kou3 jin4 qu4, zhi2 zou3, ran2 hou4 zuo3 zhuan3 jiu4 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "The counter is on the first floor. Enter through the entrance, go straight, then turn left.",
          "translation_ko": "카운터는 1층에 있습니다. 입구로 들어가서 직진하신 후 왼쪽으로 돌면 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝。請問出口在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxie. Qǐng wèn chūkǒu zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, xie4 xie5. qing3 wen4 chu1 kou3 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. Where is the exit?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 출구는 어디에 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "出口在櫃台旁邊，靠近右邊的門。",
          "pinyin": "Chūkǒu zài guìtái pángbiān, kàojìn yòu biān de mén.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "chu1 kou3 zai4 gui4 tai2 pang2 bian1, kao4 jin4 you4 bian1 de5 men2.",
          "translation_en": "The exit is next to the counter, near the door on the right.",
          "translation_ko": "출구는 카운터 옆, 오른쪽 문 근처에 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝你，我現在去櫃台。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ, wǒ xiànzài qù guìtái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 xian4 zai4 qu4 gui4 tai2.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll go to the counter now.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 지금 카운터로 가겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the counter?",
          "question_ko": "카운터는 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Second floor, turn right", "First floor, go straight then turn left", "Third floor, near the stairs"],
          "options_ko": ["2층, 오른쪽으로 돌기", "1층, 직진 후 왼쪽으로 돌기", "3층, 계단 근처"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for the counter and exit in a building."
    },
    {
      "title": "我走錯樓層了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我好像走錯樓層了。請問教室在三樓嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zǒu cuò lóucéng le. Qǐng wèn jiàoshì zài sān lóu ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zou3 cuo4 lou2 ceng2 le5. qing3 wen4 jiao4 shi4 zai4 san1 lou2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I think I'm on the wrong floor. Is the classroom on the third floor?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 제가 층을 잘못 온 것 같아요. 교실이 3층에 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "是的，教室在三樓。你現在在二樓，需要上去。",
          "pinyin": "Shì de, jiàoshì zài sān lóu. Nǐ xiànzài zài èr lóu, xūyào shàngqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "shi4 de5, jiao4 shi4 zai4 san1 lou2. ni3 xian4 zai4 zai4 er4 lou2, xu1 yao4 shang4 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, the classroom is on the third floor. You are on the second floor now, you need to go up.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 교실은 3층에 있습니다. 지금 2층에 계시니 올라가셔야 합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，請問要怎麼上去？有電梯嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn yào zěnme shàngqù? Yǒu diàntī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, qing3 wen4 yao4 zen3 me5 shang4 qu4? you3 dian4 ti1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, how do I go up? Is there an elevator?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어떻게 올라가야 합니까? 엘리베이터가 있습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，電梯在走廊中間，左邊。你也可以走樓梯上去。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, diàntī zài zǒuláng zhōngjiān, zuǒ biān. Nǐ yě kěyǐ zǒu lóutī shàngqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "you3, dian4 ti1 zai4 zou3 lang2 zhong1 jian1, zuo3 bian1. ni3 ye3 ke3 yi3 zou3 lou2 ti1 shang4 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, the elevator is in the middle of the hallway, on the left. You can also take the stairs up.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 엘리베이터는 복도 중간 왼쪽에 있습니다. 계단으로 올라가셔도 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝你，我坐電梯上去。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ, wǒ zuò diàntī shàngqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 zuo4 dian4 ti1 shang4 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll take the elevator up.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 엘리베이터를 타고 올라가겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the classroom?",
          "question_ko": "교실은 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Second floor", "Third floor", "First floor"],
          "options_ko": ["2층", "3층", "1층"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice explaining that you are on the wrong floor and asking for directions."
    }
  ]
}
